title: This Delhi High Court judge will hear Excise Policy case after Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma's withdrawal
description: The excise policy case before the Delhi High Court, in which Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) leaders including Arvind Kejriwal and Manish Sisodia are among the accused, will be heard by Justice Manoj Jain.This move comes after Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma, who was earlier hearing the matter, directed that the matter be transferred to another Bench in light of the contempt of court proceedings initiated by her against Kejriwal, Sisodia and other AAP leaders.Justice Manoj JainThe excise policy case arose in
